title: Creamy Fermented Broth Soup
description: A comforting, creamy soup made with fermented broth, silky texture, and a hint of Croatian spices.
instructions: Heat the fermented broth in a pan over medium heat.
Add the silky and stir until combined.
Add the Croatian paprika and stir for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
